document-weaver.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Convert local documents (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, HWP, Excel) to Markdown and save into your Obsidian vault.

lonelog.name: Lonelog
lonelog.author: snifer
lonelog.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Streamline solo TTRPG journaling with Lonelog notation shortcuts and templates.

note-reading-progress.name: Note Reading Progress
note-reading-progress.author: keithwithAI
note-reading-progress.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Shows remaining reading time and scroll progress for the current note in both edit and reading modes.

lark-doc.name: Lark Doc
lark-doc.author: SpatialOnee
lark-doc.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Bridge your Obsidian vault with Lark and Feishu documents.

canvas-svg-export.name: Canvas SVG Export
canvas-svg-export.author: Hēsperus
canvas-svg-export.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Export canvases to clean SVG images.

osync.name: Osync (Self-Hosted)
osync.author: Thomas Jeong
osync.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted vault sync. Run your own server (Docker).

vault-chat-agent.name: Vault Chat Agent
vault-chat-agent.author: Evgenii Bykovskikh
vault-chat-agent.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Chat with an AI assistant that can search your vault, inspect notes, and prepare edits for review

image-tab-zoom.name: Image Tab Zoom
image-tab-zoom.author: jochenbernard
image-tab-zoom.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Pinch-zoom and modifier-scroll zoom for image files opened in their own tab.

md-table-to-latex.name: Markdown Table to LaTeX
md-table-to-latex.author: pengivy1990
md-table-to-latex.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Convert Markdown tables to LaTeX array/tabular environments. 将选中的 Markdown 表格转换为 LaTeX 表格。

graph-heatmap.name: Graph Heatmap
graph-heatmap.author: Afgin Labs
graph-heatmap.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Color graph view nodes by recency, connectedness, word count, or file size. Focus Mode isolates orphans/hubs/stale notes. Built-in palettes and an in-graph control panel.

flexplorer.name: Flexplorer
flexplorer.author: kh4f
flexplorer.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Enhance the file explorer with custom sorting, pinning, and hiding.

language-learn.name: Language Learn
language-learn.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. AI-powered language learning with word analysis, relation graphs, hover tooltips, and structured note-taking.

medianoche-sync.name: Medianoche Sync
medianoche-sync.author: Takashi Ohida
medianoche-sync.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Star, Archive, and Delete actions for Medianoche-synced articles

tlp-classification.name: TLP Classification
tlp-classification.author: Rafael Santos
tlp-classification.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Classify documents using the Traffic Light Protocol (TLP). Visual selector in the properties panel, status bar indicator, and automatic PDF header/footer badge generation for Better Export PDF.

personal-kanban.name: Personal Kanban
personal-kanban.author: Jesuspinarte
personal-kanban.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A simple plugin to manage your personal projects with a Kanban Board.

charts.name: Charts for Bases
charts.author: Nikita Gaziev
charts.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Adds chart layouts to bases so you can display notes as interactive bar, line, or pie charts.

autolink-keywords.name: Linkosaurus
autolink-keywords.author: polygonhunter
autolink-keywords.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically converts keywords into Obsidian wikilinks as you type.

ttrpg-maps.name: TTRPG Maps
ttrpg-maps.author: matthttam
ttrpg-maps.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Render interactive TTRPG maps from code blocks with markers, templates, and distance measurement tools.

minimalism-ui.name: Minimalism UI
minimalism-ui.author: lucas
minimalism-ui.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Transform UI into a Typora-like style, with the left side fixing the note status information and the right side focusing on the content of the note.

bases-lock.name: Bases Lock
bases-lock.author: lucas
bases-lock.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Hides the action bar at the top of the Bases view.

make-it-rain.name: Make It Rain
make-it-rain.author: Jonathan Wagner
make-it-rain.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Pull Raindrop.io bookmarks, highlights, and attachments into Markdown notes with rich metadata, smart folder structures, and native file support.

tickban.name: Tickban
tickban.author: mash43
tickban.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically collect tasks from across your entire vault and visualize/manage them in a Kanban board.

cevent-planner.name: CEvent-Planner
cevent-planner.author: abdur-nur-porag
cevent-planner.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. An interactive event and task manager dashboard featuring modern Calendar, List, and Timeline views with live subtask tracking and system reminders.

anycontent-vault-importer.name: AnyContent Vault Importer
anycontent-vault-importer.author: Coder4
anycontent-vault-importer.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. 粘贴抖音 / TikTok / 微信公众号 / YouTube 链接，自动转录/提取/OCR 成 Markdown 并写入 vault。单一插件覆盖多平台，输出 AI-readable 文本。

ask-vault.name: AskVault
ask-vault.author: sourit2001
ask-vault.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Ask questions about your current note or vault using your local Codex CLI.

vault-time-tracker.name: Vault Time Tracker
vault-time-tracker.author: Rafael Mehdiyev
vault-time-tracker.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Track time spent on notes. Timer keeps running even when Obsidian is running on background.
